// Notes: These settings wire the Assert.IQ Agent Pack into VS Code + Copilot.
Setting names may vary slightly across VS Code / Copilot versions; adjust as needed.
The intent is: load instruction files automatically, and look for prompt files
chat.hookFilesLocations disables the Claude-side hook files for VS Code so
Copilot only loads hooks from hooks/hooks.json (preventing double-fire when
both the pack's Copilot copy and Claude's mirrored copy are present).
